title: President promulgates Ordinance to increase Supreme Court judge strength to 38
description: President Droupadi Murmu has promulgated an Ordinance increasing the sanctioned strength of judges in the Supreme Court from 33 to 37, excluding the Chief Justice of India.The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Ordinance, 2026 was notified in the Gazette of India on May 16. It amends Section 2 of the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956 by substituting the word “thirty-three” with “thirty-seven”.The amendment means that the Supreme Court can now have a Chief Justice of India and 37
